title: alchemilla vulgaris var. frigens
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. frigens, also known as the Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including menstrual cramps, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its potential to balance hormones, aid digestion, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla vulgaris var. frigens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
